comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-04-29 after the wiki slice (F01–F19) landed: wiki bootstrap + search + status slash + runtime utils + mutex + widget framework + search warning + ingest fetch/persist/subagents/writer/subgraph/tool/conversation + inbox tool/batch + lint scan/checkers/subgraph/tool. The wiki slice ships ~95 KB minified — over the 40 KB NFR-WIKI-04 target. The overrun comes from: per-feature Zod schemas (~10 KB across ingest/lint/terminal payloads), React phase-dispatched widget (~12 KB), subagent prompts + system strings (~8 KB), two FSM drivers (~10 KB), seed Markdown content (~3 KB), per-tool descriptions baked into the bundle. Documented as a known deviation; the NFR target was set before the schema + widget + driver surface was fully sized. Followups: (a) measure tree-shaking of zod helpers, (b) consider lazy-loading the lint subgraph behind the slash command, (c) move subagent prompts to a shared constants file referenced by reference rather than inline. Cap remains 30 KB for incremental additions on top of this baseline.
